title: WHOOP Client Secret #1 in git history
description: 64-char hex WHOOP OAuth client secret (0aca5c56...) committed in 11 files across git history. 2 files still on HEAD. Secret must be rotated.
evidence: gitleaks finding: tools/whoop_*.py (6 files, commit dd70570)
fix: 1) Rotate at developer.whoop.com 2) Redact archive doc 3) BFG purge history

title: WHOOP Client Secret #2 in git history
description: 64-char hex WHOOP OAuth client secret (7f0faa28...) committed in test_whoop_api.sh. File deleted from HEAD but secret remains in history.
fix: 1) Rotate at developer.whoop.com (if still active) 2) BFG purge history

title: Archive audit doc still contains plaintext secret on HEAD
description: docs/archive/audits_2026-01/RED_TEAM_AUDIT_2026-01-02.md line 33 contains WHOOP client secret in a code example.
evidence: grep match: static let whoopClientSecret = "0aca5c56..." at line 33
fix: Replace secret value with REDACTED in the archive doc

title: .gitignore missing 7 sensitive file patterns
description: Only Secrets.swift is covered. Missing: *.p12, *.pem, *.key, .env, .env.*, *.mobileprovision, *.xcarchive
fix: Add all 7 missing patterns to .gitignore

title: .cache_ggshield tracked in git
description: Root .cache_ggshield file is git-tracked and contains ggshield secret scan cache with a hash value.
evidence: git ls-files .cache_ggshield returns file; contents show last_found_secrets JSON
fix: Add .cache_ggshield to .gitignore and git rm --cached .cache_ggshield

title: Duplicate CSVExporter.swift (different implementations)
description: ios/Core/CSVExporter.swift (176 LOC, platform-free) and ios/DoseTap/Export/CSVExporter.swift (48 LOC, CoreData) share same filename.
evidence: git ls-files shows both; head -10 shows different structs/enums
fix: Rename app version to EventCSVExporter.swift or consolidate

title: Duplicate TimeIntervalMath.swift (diverged copies)
description: ios/Core/TimeIntervalMath.swift (54 LOC) and ios/DoseTap/TimeIntervalMath.swift (46 LOC) are different files with same name.
evidence: diff shows files are DIFFERENT; Core version is canonical
fix: Delete app copy; import from DoseCore instead

title: Orphan ios/DoseTap/Package.swift
description: Embedded Package.swift defines ios/DoseTap as its own SwiftPM package with path:'.'. Conflicts with root Package.swift.
evidence: cat ios/DoseTap/Package.swift shows standalone package definition
fix: Remove or .gitignore. Root Package.swift is authoritative.

title: docs/archive bloat (72 tracked files)
description: 72 tracked files in docs/archive/, mostly 2025-12 audit session logs. Historical ballast.
fix: Move to archive branch or trim to essentials

title: Untracked archive/ directory
description: 75 files on disk in root archive/, 0 tracked. Local-only reference material.
evidence: find archive/ -type f | wc -l = 75; git ls-files archive/ | wc -l = 0
fix: Awareness only — appears intentional

title: shadcn-ui/ abandoned directory
description: shadcn-ui/ has config files on disk but 0 tracked files. Abandoned web UI experiment.
fix: Remove directory or .gitignore explicitly

title: SwiftLint includes non-existent ios/AppMinimal
description: .swiftlint.yml includes ios/AppMinimal which does not exist. Silently ignored.
evidence: grep ios/AppMinimal .swiftlint.yml; ls ios/AppMinimal not found
fix: Remove entry from .swiftlint.yml

title: SleepEventType/EventType split-brain
description: Core SleepEventType has 13 cases. App EventType has 26+ cases including napStart/napEnd which are missing from Core. Potential for missed routing if Core ever needs nap events.
fix: Add napStart/napEnd to SleepEventType or document the intentional split

title: URLRouter bypasses DoseTapCore for extra doses
description: URLRouter ~line 200 calls SessionRepository.shared.saveDose2(timestamp:isExtraDose:true) directly instead of going through DoseTapCore facade. Channel parity violation for extra dose path.
fix: Route extra dose through DoseTapCore.shared like normal dose path

title: EventType congestion/grogginess misleading naming
description: EventType.congestion and EventType.grogginess are check-in display fields, not loggable sleep events, but sit alongside actual sleep events in the enum.
fix: Consider separating into CheckInField enum or adding doc comments

title: CloudKit entitlement present but no implementation
description: DoseTap.entitlements includes com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers and com.apple.developer.icloud-services with CloudKit. Zero CKContainer/CKRecord/CKDatabase imports. SSOT says 'Cloud sync: not implemented'.
fix: Remove CloudKit entitlement to reduce attack surface and app review questions

title: Missing privacy manifest (PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy)
description: Apple requires PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy since Spring 2024 for apps using UserDefaults, file timestamps, HealthKit. No manifest found in the project.
fix: Create PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy declaring NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes for UserDefaults and HealthKit

title: Overlapping SwiftPM jobs across workflows
description: ci.yml swiftpm-tests and ci-swift.yml build-and-test both trigger on PRs and both run swift build + swift test. Every PR runs the full SwiftPM suite twice. ci.yml version is strictly more comprehensive (3 TZ, 4 guards, suite verification).
fix: Remove build-and-test from ci-swift.yml; consolidate test summary into ci.yml

title: Overlapping Xcode build jobs across workflows
description: ci.yml xcode-tests (build+test) and ci-swift.yml xcode-build (build-only) both trigger on PRs. Duplicate Xcode compilation. ci.yml does strictly more.
fix: Remove xcode-build from ci-swift.yml or gate to only run when ci.yml is not triggered

title: Inconsistent runner versions across workflows
description: ci.yml uses macos-latest (all 5 jobs). ci-swift.yml mixes macos-latest (build-and-test) with macos-14 (storage-enforcement, print-ban, xcode-build). Different Xcode/Swift versions between runners.
evidence: ci-swift.yml: 3 jobs on macos-14, 1 on macos-latest
fix: Standardize all jobs on macos-latest or pin a consistent version

title: No concurrency group on ci-swift.yml
description: ci.yml has concurrency: ci-${{ github.ref }} with cancel-in-progress. ci-swift.yml has no concurrency config. Rapid PR updates stack redundant runs.
fix: Add matching concurrency group to ci-swift.yml

title: Pre-commit hook not auto-installed
description: Hook requires manual git config core.hooksPath .githooks. Documented only in hook file header. New contributors may work without local safety net.
fix: Add setup.sh or Makefile target; document in README

title: ci-docs.yml path filter may miss code-driven SSOT breaks
description: ci-docs.yml only triggers on docs/** changes. Code changes modifying constants won't trigger markdown link check or OpenAPI validation. Partially mitigated by ci.yml ssot-lint job.
fix: Consider adding ios/Core/** to trigger paths or consolidate into ci.yml

title: ggshield absent from local and CI toolchain
description: .cache_ggshield tracked (HYG-001) suggests past use. ggshield not installed locally, not in any CI workflow, not in pre-commit hook. No automated secret scanning tool in pipeline.
fix: Re-add gitleaks/ggshield to CI or document intentional removal. Remove .cache_ggshield (cross-ref HYG-001)

title: Secrets.swift setup not documented; blocks Xcode build for new devs
description: Secrets.swift is gitignored. New devs must discover Secrets.template.swift exists and copy it. Not documented in README or TESTING_GUIDE.
fix: Document in README Quick Start and add to make setup target

title: Pre-commit hook requires manual activation; not documented in README
description: Hook at .githooks/pre-commit is robust (5 checks) but requires manual git config core.hooksPath .githooks. Not mentioned in README.
fix: Document in README and add to make setup target

title: swift test SIGTSTP workaround only in TESTING_GUIDE, not README
description: The script -q workaround for terminal SIGTSTP is documented in TESTING_GUIDE (line 21-22) but not in README Quick Start.
fix: Add note to README or wrap in Makefile test target

title: No 'which build system?' guidance in README
description: Two build systems (SwiftPM for core logic, Xcode for app) without guidance on when to use which.
evidence: README.md shows both swift build and open xcodeproj but no explanation
fix: Add 'Which build system?' section to README

title: No setup automation (Makefile/justfile/setup.sh)
description: No one-command setup exists. Checked: Makefile, justfile, setup.sh, bootstrap.sh, Brewfile, .tool-versions, .swift-version, .xcode-version, Mintfile — all missing.
evidence: ls of all setup artifact names = all missing
fix: Create Makefile with setup, build, test, lint, clean, xcode, ci targets

title: README missing prerequisites (Xcode, macOS, Swift versions)
description: README does not list required Xcode version, macOS version, or Swift version.
fix: Add prerequisites section to README

title: 12 orphan Python scripts in ios/ root (one-time migration tools)
description: ios/ contains 12+ Python scripts (add_assets_catalog.py, fix_project.py, etc.) that were one-time migration tools. No longer needed.
fix: Archive to tools/archive/ or delete

title: No .swift-version or .xcode-version for environment standardization
description: No .swift-version (for swiftenv) or .xcode-version (for xcodes) files. Contributors may use different tool versions.
fix: Add .swift-version file with current Swift version

title: Total identified debt: 33 items. ~27h to clear Top 20
description: Audit identified 33 findings (2 P0, 6 P1, 14 P2, 11 P3). Top 20 backlog estimated at ~27 hours (~3.5 dev-days). Ranked by ROI in 07_strategy_tech_debt.md.
fix: Execute Top 20 backlog per priority order in 07_strategy_tech_debt.md
